description: Morning brief 2026-04-20. Nifty opened 24,338.15 (-0.063% gap-down). Intraday hit low 24,241 / high 24,420. Ceasefire expires Tuesday 04-21 (T-1). Kushner+Witkoff Islamabad talks today. Brent $97-98 on Hormuz re-close. Opening bias: PARTIAL grade (flat-band, tilt wrong on primary forecast). Session direction: VOLATILE_SIDEWAYS_MILDLY_BULLISH (range 24,180-24,480, conviction 2/5). Key intraday trigger: Kushner-talks leak.

market_regime.label: GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_CEASEFIRE_COLLAPSE
market_regime.key_risk: Ceasefire talks collapsed April 22. Iran refused Islamabad talks, JD Vance cancelled Pakistan trip, US put Iran negotiations on hold. Brent surging $97-102+ with spike above $100 intraday. Ceasefire expiry imminent.
market_regime.dominant_risk: Full ceasefire collapse tonight (IST) — Brent spikes $108-118, Nifty -3 to -5%, defense stocks surge. Binary outcome still live.
market_regime.crude_note: Brent surged to $101.97 at peak (April 22 AM IST) on talk collapse + Vance cancellation. Some retreat to $97-98 on partial talks hopes. Highly volatile.
market_regime.crude_current_zone: DANGER_ZONE (>$95 — India oil import pain, OMC losses, current account pressure)
market_regime.regime_note: Regime shifted April 22 from CRITICAL_EXPIRY_BINARY to GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED_CEASEFIRE_COLLAPSE. Iran refused talks, Vance cancelled Pakistan trip. Markets opening gap-down. Defense stocks to surge. Overall market BEARISH.

opening_bias.rationale: No formal opening-bias forecast for 2026-04-22 — EOD wrap 2026-04-21 did not execute.

session_direction.key_assumption: Ceasefire talks have collapsed: Iran refused to attend Islamabad talks, JD Vance cancelled Pakistan trip, US put Iran negotiations on hold. Brent crude surging to $97-102 (with spikes above $100). India markets open with a gap-down of ~0.5-0.6% and are likely to remain under sustained pressure. Defense stocks (ASTRA MICRO, MAZDOCK, COCHINSHIP) will surge on geopolitical premium returning. Broader market, financials, aviation, OMCs will face selling. This is a regime-change session back toward GEOPOLITICAL_RISK_ELEVATED.
session_direction.brent_forecast: $95-108 — highly volatile. Floor at $95 only if talks revive; ceiling at $110+ on full Hormuz re-close.

full_ceasefire_collapse.description: Ceasefire expires without extension. Brent spikes above $105. Nifty sells off 1.5-3% from open.

partial_collapse_uncertainty.description: Talks on hold but ceasefire technically still holds. Brent stays $95-102. Market volatile sideways with downward bias.

surprise_revival.description: Back-channel talks revive by IST afternoon. Brent reverses below $95. Defense corrects, financials recover.

key_risks: Ceasefire full collapse tonight — Iran forces re-engage, Brent spikes to $108-118
Hormuz re-closure confirmation — triggers crude spiral
Brent sustained above $100 kills India earnings recovery thesis
Defense stocks parabolic move — ASTRA MICRO position at huge gain, exit timing critical
FII selling resumes on geopolitical risk escalation
key_opportunities: Defense sector: ASTRA MICRO, MAZDOCK, COCHINSHIP, GRSE — surge on ceasefire collapse. P025/P030 both triggered.
SETFGOLD / GOLDBEES / SILVERBEES — safe-haven bid. DO NOT sell gold today.
OMC shorts (MRPL, BPCL) on Brent >$100 pressure.
Tech Mahindra results post-market — M013 applies (IT sector weak).

ceasefire_binary_matrix.key_signal: April 20 Kushner/Witkoff talks in Islamabad — any positive signal = pre-pricing of extension

stocks_to_watch.reason: P025 CHECK DATE TODAY (April 22). April 21 close 1111.1 — ABOVE_RANGE vs target 1050-1100. With ceasefire collapse, stock likely surging further today. P025 = ABOVE_RANGE. P030 thesis (correction to 1010-1060 on extension) now PAUSED — extension not happening.
P026 CHECK DATE TODAY (April 22). April 21 close 103.6 — WRONG vs target 92-96. Stock stayed above 100. P010 check April 29 (target 85-95) also heading WRONG.
Defense stocks surge on ceasefire collapse. Brent above $100 keeps defense premium elevated. Watch for capitulation sellers vs momentum buyers.
Safe-haven bid on geopolitical escalation. DO NOT sell gold today. P029 (target 123-127 by April 26 if extension) now deferred — gold likely rallying back toward 132-138 on risk-off.
OMCs under pressure — Brent above $100 means GRM compression. P017 (MRPL target 200-210 by May 8) probability falling back to 2⭐ from 4⭐.
Q4FY26 results post-market today. M013 applies. Expected PAT +9% QoQ. SELL_ON_EARNINGS_NEWS_IT pattern. Plus geopolitical overlay adds uncertainty.
Financials sector under broad pressure. JIOFIN (ICICI+Groww combined loss). Monitor if BankNifty corrects today.

prompt_for_morning_brief: MORNING BRIEF 2026-04-22 ALREADY EXECUTED at 09:15 IST. EOD wrap must: (1) Score session direction (BEARISH_VOLATILE range 23900-24350). (2) Check ASTRA MICRO and IRFC actual closing prices for P025/P026 final grade. (3) Score Tech Mahindra Q4 — M013 sell-on-news check. (4) Update ceasefire status — did it expire or extend? (5) Set opening bias for 2026-04-23 (Infosys Q4 results day). (6) Check SWIGGY vs 260 (P001 April 25 pre-assess). (7) Critical: gold direction given geopolitical escalation.
